metadata.description: A DataHub skill that audits statistical honesty of metrics/models — leakage, overfit, calibration — and contributes verdicts back to the graph. Composes the official datahub-search and datahub-quality skills and adds the statistical layer they lack. Intended for contribution to datahub-project/datahub-skills as a 6th skill.

plugins.name: datahub-trust-audit
plugins.description: Statistical trust auditing skill for DataHub (see skills/datahub-trust-audit/SKILL.md).
